name: byNordic Acquisition Corp
business: ByNordic Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed to effect a business combination, focusing on acquiring a technology growth company in northern Europe. It has no current operations or revenue. The company completed an IPO in February 2022 and holds funds in a trust account for its initial business combination.

exposures.sentence: Our management team has experience and knowledge in several high-performing technology sectors, including FinTech, digital infrastructure, software including artificial intelligence, health technology, sustainability/climate technology, transportation technology and industrial technology.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination or company will liquidate
catalysts.sentence: If our initial business combination is not consummated by April 12, 2026 or the end of any further extension period, then our existence will terminate, and we will distribute all amounts in the trust account.

tamClaims.claim: The European technology industry had approximately $44 billion of capital invested in technology startups in 2025 and over 40,000 funded technology companies.
tamClaims.sentence: The European technology industry represents a large target market, with approximately $44 billion of capital invested in technology startups in 2025 and over 40,000 funded technology companies, according to the State of European Tech 2025 report by Atomico, Orrick, HSBC, AWS and Slush.

tamClaims.claim: The private and public markets European technology ecosystem value grew from less than $1 trillion to approximately $4 trillion from 2016 through 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the same report, the private and public markets European technology ecosystem value has grown from less than $1 trillion to approximately $4 trillion from 2016 through 2025, and the number of founders starting new European technology companies increased approximately 60% from 2023 to more than 27,000.
